chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-462 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08-12-2023 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Pulpoto, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Umrah Khan Yousufzai, Advocate for proposed accused. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali, Additional P.G. ***** Learned counsel for applicant after arguing the matter does not press this application and submits that applicant would file a Crl. Direct Complaint against proposed accused. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed leaving the applicant at liberty to avail remedy including Direct Complaint before the proper forum, which shall be decided on its own merits. JUDGE Ahmad
